text.message: If green gets that port it is over
u have more sheep than me
Your set up would be absurd
yeah OJ can you build a house on the sheep port?
we need to shut down green

idk if we gotta gang up on me this early when red has a city and three devs
you have god set up mayne
how is mine that much better than reds
No Green is still the threat
You city up and then take off
this is why u dont fixate on one person off the bat
ok we need to shut down red
yeah idk i got lucky rolls
